commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an `upstreamRes` error handler in debug proxy HTTP forwarding and a regression test for an origin that aborts mid-response.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +78. Total +91 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the upstream response stream has no `error` listener, and the Node EventEmitter contract makes an unhandled `error` event process-fatal; this read-only review did not run a local crash repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow mechanical lint repair in the new test file; no product or ownership decision is needed.

target.title: fix(proxy): add error handler on upstream response stream
target.author: sebtardif
